title: Thai Gouda Wrap
description: A delicious Thai-inspired wrap filled with savory gouda cheese and sweet Croatian sausage. Perfect for lunch or dinner.
instructions: Preheat a pan over medium heat.
Slice the Croatian sausage into thin rounds.
Add the sausage to the pan and cook until browned.
Add the gouda cheese to the pan and stir until melted.
Add the savory sauce and sweet chili sauce to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the sliced Thai basil to the pan and stir to combine.
Warm the large wrap in the microwave for 10-15 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by placing the cheese mixture onto the wrap and topping with cilantro.
